title: glandularia gooddingii
intro: Glandularia gooddingii, also known as Goodding's verbena, is a flowering plant in the verbenaceae family, native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to promote wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Glandularia gooddingii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health concerns. Herbal preparations of Glandularia gooddingii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
